Key Takeaways
  1. NTP volume is stable at 26 with -4% MoM change.
  2. All-time NTP total: 394. Three-month run: 90 (23% of all-time).
  3. Credit-to-NTP conversion: 15%. Install conversion: 25%. Focus on improving fall-off between stages.
  4. Current weekly run rate: ~13 NTPs/week, projecting ~676 annualized.
  5. Currently ranked #39 among all LightReach EPCs by 30-day NTP volume.
